description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.
